headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on AvalonBay Communities, Raises Price Target to $195
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Alexander Goldfarb   maintains AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $183 to $195.
